prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day horizon on Visa stock, I applied typical short-term volatility assumptions. Visa typically has annual volatility around 20-25%, translating to roughly 1.3-1.6% daily volatility. For 2 days, this gives approximately 1.8-2.3% standard deviation. I used a normal distribution centered at the current price with widening intervals for higher confidence levels, accounting for the stock's relatively stable large-cap characteristics while acknowledging short-term market uncertainty.
